feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: best Berlin summer dinner spot if you like drinks & dance ⬇️ Strandbar Mitte is THE place to be on a sunny summer evening in Berlin. It's an outdoor dance hall / bar / pizza joint right along the Spree. Totally free to come and dance, the music changes
entry.content: best Berlin summer dinner spot if you like drinks & dance ⬇️ Strandbar Mitte is THE place to be on a sunny summer evening in Berlin. It's an outdoor dance hall / bar / pizza joint right along the Spree. Totally free to come and dance, the music changes

entry.title: hello from Lisbon 👋 here all week with @Flodesk on a creator trip! #flodesk #lisbon #portugal #emailmarketing #affiliates #influencermarketing #portugaltiktok #lisbonportugal #whimsysoul #vlog #influencertrip
entry.content: hello from Lisbon 👋 here all week with @Flodesk on a creator trip! #flodesk #lisbon #portugal #emailmarketing #affiliates #influencermarketing #portugaltiktok #lisbonportugal #whimsysoul #vlog #influencertrip

entry.title: a local's San Francisco guide ⬇️ 9 epic spots you can't miss... Except THIS IS NOT SAN FRANCISCO. This is Lisbon, Portugal!! 🇵🇹🇵🇹🇵🇹 Isn't it WILD how similar these two cities are?? I'm in Lisbon right now but... I could swear I didn't actually leave Calif
entry.content: a local's San Francisco guide ⬇️ 9 epic spots you can't miss... Except THIS IS NOT SAN FRANCISCO. This is Lisbon, Portugal!! 🇵🇹🇵🇹🇵🇹 Isn't it WILD how similar these two cities are?? I'm in Lisbon right now but... I could swear I didn't actually leave Calif

entry.title: I gasped outloud when i saw this place IRL. The hallways look like Hogwarts but the whimiscal detailing makes it feel Arabian. Mosteiro dos Jerónimos and Belem Tower are stunning pieces of history in Lisbon, Portugal that you can't miss!! #lisbon #portuga
entry.content: I gasped outloud when i saw this place IRL. The hallways look like Hogwarts but the whimiscal detailing makes it feel Arabian. Mosteiro dos Jerónimos and Belem Tower are stunning pieces of history in Lisbon, Portugal that you can't miss!! #lisbon #portuga

entry.title: SAN FRANCISCO Pride Guide ⬇️🌈 SF is THE place to celebrate Pride!!! It's one of my favorite times to be in the city and seeing everyone out with silly grins on their faces, wearing the best outfits, dancing, spreading love and enjoying life. There's alwa

entry.title: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
